headline: Mohamed Salah
body: Mohamed Salah 🤝 attacking returns 🇪🇬 FPL Premier League (premierleague) Mohamed Salah scores. Mohamed Salah assists. It sounds very familiar. Egypt are celebrating their first ever victory at a World Cup after Salah - in his 118th appearance for his country - sparked a 3-1 comeback win against New Zealand 👏 —
